title: Gainax working on Eva A day at NERV
display_title: Gainax working on Eva A day at NERV
wikitext:
[]: Gainax working on Eva= A day at NERV?             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sat Jan 23, 2010 11:14 pm Imagine this: It's around early 1996 and EVA's around the 20-something episodes. After the blood bath that was episode 18, Sega is forced to cut the budget severly and all hell breaks lose, much like NERV's battle against the Angels. I can just imagined it: The Gainax animators gathered around the HQ like the NERV crew working diligently, looking for alternate, cheaper ways to use the budget. The seiyu's in the other room, in ‘synch ratio' with their character's mouth flaps. At the top of it all is Anno, who occasionally gives out an order or two while being a badass in his comfy chair doing the Gendo pose. Suddenly the president of the network arrives, looking furious and demanding results. The Gainax crew try and rush to victory...

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 23, 2010 11:26 pm Isn't that exactly what happened?

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Sun Jan 24, 2010 1:20 am Sachi wrote: Isn't that exactly what happened?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Jan 24, 2010 10:52 am It probably came closer to resembling the old "Star Trek Gets Cancelled" skit on SNL.

[]: Re: Gainax working on Eva= A day at NERV?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 24, 2010 11:34 am DevRei17 wrote: Suddenly the president of the network arrives, looking furious and demanding results. The Gainax crew try and rush to victory...
